studies.title: Evaluation of digital tobacco cessation using the example of the online program and app "NichtraucherHelden"

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'NichtraucherHelden,' which matches the product name 'NichtraucherHelden-App.' While the abstract is not available and the intervention is not specified, the title strongly indicates the study is about this specific DTx product.

_classification.reason: The study appears to evaluate a digital tobacco cessation program in a real-world setting, likely observational in nature. Lack of explicit indicators of randomization, blinding, or placebo control suggests it is RWE.
